title: General Mariano Alvarez Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting General Mariano Alvarez, with extreme temperatures. The Z-Score of +4.34 indicates a highly unusual event.
body:
The current heat wave in General Mariano Alvarez has reached a critical level, with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature has resulted in a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 14.2 GG, while the Heating Degree Day (HDD) remains at 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 58%, with a wind speed of 16.3 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave's effects.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the heat wave's impact.
